name: Barbecued Turkey and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 skinless turkey thighs, cut in half (about 2 pounds)
3 medium potatoes, unpeeled, cut into 8 pieces each
6 medium carrots, cut into 2 1/2 x 1/2-inch sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, blend barbecue sauce with hot water.
2. Layer turkey, potatoes, and carrots in an electric crockpot.
3. Pour the sauce mixture over the top.
4. Cover and cook on Low for at least 9 hours.
5. Remove the turkey and vegetables using a slotted spoon.
6. Place them on a serving platter.
7. Serve with cooking juice over the turkey and vegetables.
